The phase succeeds once a concrete review sheet exists and training remains closed behind owner correction.

interpretation: V1.13F completes its bounded assembly mission once a reviewable commercial-space pilot sheet exists.
That is enough to close the phase cleanly without auto-labeling or auto-training.
